emails.subject: RE: RE-RE (as in the short bus)
emails.body: RE: RE-RE (as in the short bus) Nefarious is..... 1.flagrantly wicked or impious 2.Bill Williams III To: Symes, Kate

emails.subject: RE-RE (as in the short bus)
emails.body: RE-RE (as in the short bus) Pedantic is... 1 of, relating to, or being a pedant 2 narrowly, stodgily, and often ostentatiously learned 3 UNIMAGINATIVE, PEDESTRIAN To: Williams III, Bill

emails.subject: RE: RE-RE (as in the short bus)
emails.body: Chuckle, chuckle. To: Williams III, Bill
